context.projectOverview: Sprint 12 of 28. Tier 2 (careful-flow). Adds the feedback-router that maps a rejected checkpoint → the responsible agent and re-invokes with feedback. Iteration cap, edit-delta application, !!abort escape hatch.
completedSprintsInTier2: Sprint 7: Checkpoint plumbing (types, registry, sites, noop)
Sprint 9: Disk mechanism + bober approve/reject CLI
Sprint 10: PR mechanism (GhClient seam, checkpointStates Map, prReady)
Sprint 11: Renderer registry + 9 per-type renderers wired into cli/disk/pr
relevantFiles: src/orchestrator/checkpoints/types.ts (CheckpointId union; CheckpointOutcome discriminated union: approved|rejected|edit)
src/orchestrator/checkpoints/sites.ts (where checkpoints are invoked in the pipeline)
src/orchestrator/pipeline.ts or pipeline-coordinator.ts (where rejection is currently HANDLED — almost certainly noop today)
src/config/schema.ts (Zod schema for bober.config.json; add maxCheckpointIterations)
